ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot enthusiastically pointing towards a school building, perhaps indicating the location of a school or expressing excitement about going to school. The sequence will feature the robot's right arm primarily, while the left arm remains in a relaxed position. The animation will focus on the robot's expressiveness and the gesture of pointing. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will have the right arm beginning to extend outward, with the wrist slightly rotated to prepare for pointing. Frame 3 will show the right arm fully extended, pointing clearly, and the wrist rotated to point directly. Frame 4 will show the right arm beginning to return to its resting position, with the wrist rotating back. Frame 5 will show both arms back at rest. This sequence will use smooth transitions between frames to enhance the natural look of the robot's movements.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready for school
the right arm begins to extend, ready to point
the right arm points directly, indicating the school
the right arm begins to retract, the point made
both arms return to rest, the lesson is over
